violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained and in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment on the grill line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The walls in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The grout and tiles through out the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by roaches. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with increased pest control to completely eliminate roaches. Establishment is to continue to clean and sanitize all cooking and food contact surfaces. Establishment is to have pest control complete bombing for roaches and subsequently have establishment professionally cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The establishment area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to be professionally cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The tiles and grout in the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment Ice Machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of, establishment to clean and sanitize machine before use. Establishment is to send a photo to RIDOH of cleaned ice machine before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed in containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged salmon was observed thawing in an sealed ROP package. ROP fish product must be removed from package before thawing. Salmon was observed at 37 degrees product was removed from package. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The flooring in the mop sink area is in poor repair. Grout has receded well below tile level. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Flooring must be repaired/regrouted or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The lower portion of some of the walls have an accumulation of soil residue and black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per interview of PIC, walls are in the process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
